identity.name: Hextech Ascended
identity.description: A competitive, high-contrast dark theme inspired by League of Legends' Hextech technology. It combines deep obsidian backgrounds with magical blue glows and prestige gold accents to evoke a sense of elite competition.
identity.target_audience: League of Legends players, Tournament Organizers, Esports fans in LAS region

grid_strategies.leaderboard: grid grid-cols-12 gap-4 items-center p-4 border-b border-[#785A28]/20 hover:bg-[#C89B3C]/5 transition-colors

buttons.primary: relative overflow-hidden bg-[#1E2328] border border-[#C89B3C] text-[#C89B3C] hover:bg-[#C89B3C] hover:text-[#010A13] transition-all duration-300 uppercase tracking-widest font-bold py-3 px-8 clip-path-hextech
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#0AC8B9] text-[#0AC8B9] hover:bg-[#0AC8B9]/10 transition-all duration-300 uppercase tracking-widest font-semibold py-2 px-6

cards.summoner: group relative bg-[#0A1B30] border border-[#785A28]/40 p-6 hover:border-[#C89B3C] transition-all duration-300 hover:shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(200,155,60,0.15)]
cards.stat_box: bg-[#010A13]/50 border border-[#0AC8B9]/20 p-4 flex flex-col items-center justify-center

inputs.search: bg-[#010A13] border border-[#785A28] text-[#F0E6D2] placeholder-[#785A28] focus:border-[#C89B3C] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#C89B3C] h-12 px-4 w-full

rank_icons.note: Use CSS borders/colors to denote rank if specific icons are unavailable. Gold = Yellow Border, Iron = Grey Border.

assets.icons: Use Lucide React (Sword, Shield, Trophy, Search, UserPlus, Activity)

setup_steps: Install fonts: Add Google Fonts import to index.css
Configure Tailwind: Add custom colors (obsidian, gold, hextech_blue) to tailwind.config.js
Global CSS: Add .clip-path-hextech utility class in index.css
Layout: Create a MainLayout component with the dark obsidian background and sticky glass header

home.structure: Hero Section (Search + CTA) -> Leaderboard Table (Top 100) -> Features Grid
home.key_elements: Animated 'Rank Up' counter, Glowing Gold borders for Top 3 players

summoner_detail.structure: Profile Header (Icon + Level + Rank) -> LP Graph (Recharts) -> Recent Matches List
summoner_detail.key_elements: Large Rank Insignia (CSS/Image), Winrate Circular Progress Bar

add_summoner.key_elements: Input with 'Summoner#TAG' validation, Loading Spinner with Hextech Blue color

accessibility.contrast: Ensure Gold text on Obsidian background meets 4.5:1. Use lighter gold (#F0E6D2) for small text.
accessibility.interactive: All buttons must have :focus-visible styles with a glowing ring.

do_not: Do not use pure black (#000000). Use Obsidian (#091428).
Do not use rounded corners > 8px. Keep it sharp/angular for the Hextech feel.
Do not use generic 'Bootstrap' blue. Use Teal/Cyan for magic elements.
must_do: Use data-testid on all interactive elements.
Use 'Cinzel' font for all Section Headings.
Add a subtle noise texture overlay to the background to prevent banding.
